businessQuestion: Which channels generate the highest average order value?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DC.CHANNEL_NAME,
    SUM(NET_SALES_AMT) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
    ROUND(
        SUM(NET_SALES_AMT)/
        COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_ID),2
    ) AS AVG_ORDER_VALUE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SALES FS
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_CHANNEL DC
ON FS.CHANNEL_KEY=DC.CHANNEL_KEY
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY AVG_ORDER_VALUE DESC;
businessContext: Executives want to compare online and offline channel performance.
